title: EnergyResourceMeter
description: Typed schema for metering-point energy resources (type = METER). CIM: cim:Meter / cim:EndDevice (IEC 61968-9). A METER anchors all DER sub-resources topologically and carries the physical installation location, feeder/bus references, and communication technology.

type.description: Asset-class discriminator. Must be "METER". CIM: cim:Meter (IEC 61968-9 EndDevice subtype).

subResources.description: Child resources behind this meter (DERs, storage, loads). Each item is a bare id string or an inline EnergyResource object.

parentResources.description: ids of parent resources (e.g. feeder or substation this meter is supplied from).

EnergyResourceMeterAttributes.description: Attributes for METER resources. Includes common fields (make, model, ratedPowerKw, telemetryProvider, commissioningDate, gps) plus meter-specific fields.

ratedPowerKw.description: Manufacturer-rated peak power, kW. CIM: GeneratingUnit.maxOperatingP.

telemetryProvider.description: Vendor API / data source identifier for telemetry.

commissioningDate.description: ISO 8601 date when this meter was commissioned.

meterType.description: Meter kind classification per Green Button / ESPI taxonomy. CIM: EndDevice.amrSystem.

feeder.description: Feeder identifier this meter is supplied from.

bus.description: Busbar identifier at the meter's connection point.

location.description: Postal/physical location of the meter installation (beckn Location shape).

communicationTechnology.description: Last-mile communication technology used by this meter's head-end system.
